rule_metadata.name: tables_inject
rule_metadata.description: Find zip archives of tables inject panel
rule_metadata.author: Brian Carter

rules.rule_text:
rule tables_inject
{
	meta:
		description = "Find zip archives of tables inject panel"
		author = "Brian Carter"
		last_modified = "August 14, 2017"

	strings:
		$txt1 = "tinymce"
		$txt2 = "cunion.js"
		$txt3 = "tables.php"
		$txt4 = "sounds/1.mp3"
		$txt5 = "storage/db.sqlite"
		$magic = { 50 4b 03 04 }

	condition:
		$magic at 0 and all of ( $txt* )
}
